narrative:
Goshen Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 889 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
